name: Brown Honey Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the wholemeal flour, salt, and baking powder.
2. Rub in the butter until the mixture resembles breadcrumbs.
3. Dissolve the honey in the milk and add to the dry ingredients. Mix until a soft dough forms.
4. Roll out the dough on a floured surface to about 1/2 inch thickness.
5. Cut out shapes with a knife or cookie cutter and place them on an ungreased baking sheet.
6. Bake for 10-12 minutes at 425°F (220°C) until golden brown.
7. Turn off the oven and let cool on the baking sheet before removing.
